---
title: "Lasso Regression"
format: pdf
---

```{r include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(arrow)
library(glmnet)
library(broom)
library(gt)
library(ggthemes)
library(patchwork)

data <- read_parquet("../data/clean_data.parquet")
```

```{r echo=FALSE}

model_inputs <- data %>% 
  dplyr::filter(
    age > 18,
    esr != "Not in Labor Force"
  ) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(
    cit_simp = ifelse(cit != "Not a U.S. citizen", "Citizen", "Non-Citizen"),
    cit_simp = factor(cit_simp, levels = c("Citizen", "Non-Citizen")),
    education = factor(
      education,
      levels = c(
        "Post-bacc professional degree",
        "Doctorate degree",
        "Master's degree",
        "Bachelor's degree",
        "Associate's degree",
        "Some college",
        "Regular high school diploma",
        "GED or alternative credential",
        "Less than High School"
      )
    )
  ) %>% 
  dplyr::select(
    income_personal, race_simp, cit_simp, education, pwgtp, age
  )
```

```{r}

model_inputs %>%
  summarise(
    education = names(sort(table(education), decreasing = TRUE))[1],
    race_simp = names(sort(table(race_simp), decreasing = TRUE))[1],
    cit_simp  = names(sort(table(cit_simp), decreasing = TRUE))[1]
  )
```

```{r}
lasso_data <- model_inputs %>% 
  mutate(
    log_income = log(income_personal),
    education = relevel(factor(education), ref = "Bachelor's degree"),
    race_simp = relevel(factor(race_simp), ref = "Hispanic"),
    cit_simp  = relevel(factor(cit_simp), ref = "Citizen")
  ) %>% 
  filter(
    is.finite(log_income),
    !is.na(age),
    !is.na(education),
    !is.na(race_simp),
    !is.na(cit_simp),
    !is.na(pwgtp)
  )
```

```{r}
x_pop <- model.matrix(
  log_income ~ age + education + race_simp + cit_simp +
    education:race_simp + education:cit_simp + race_simp:cit_simp,
  data = lasso_data
)[, -1]

y_pop <- lasso_data$log_income
w_pop <- lasso_data$pwgtp
```

```{r}
set.seed(544)

cv_lasso_pop <- cv.glmnet(
  x = x_pop,
  y = y_pop,
  alpha = 1,
  family = "gaussian",
  weights = w_pop,
  standardize = TRUE,
  nfolds = 10
)

lasso_pop_min <- glmnet(
  x = x_pop,
  y = y_pop,
  alpha = 1,
  family = "gaussian",
  weights = w_pop,
  standardize = TRUE,
  lambda = cv_lasso_pop$lambda.min
)

lasso_pop_1se <- glmnet(
  x = x_pop,
  y = y_pop,
  alpha = 1,
  family = "gaussian",
  weights = w_pop,
  standardize = TRUE,
  lambda = cv_lasso_pop$lambda.1se
)
```

```{r}
pop_coef_min <- coef(lasso_pop_min) %>%
  as.matrix() %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("term") %>%
  rename(estimate = s0) %>%
  filter(term != "(Intercept)", estimate != 0) %>%
  mutate(
    percent_change = round((exp(estimate) - 1) * 100, 1)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(estimate)))

pop_coef_1se <- coef(lasso_pop_1se) %>%
  as.matrix() %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("term") %>%
  rename(estimate = s0) %>%
  filter(term != "(Intercept)", estimate != 0) %>%
  mutate(
    percent_change = round((exp(estimate) - 1) * 100, 1)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(estimate)))
```

```{r}
pop_coef_min %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Population Lasso Results at lambda.min") %>%
  cols_label(
    term = "Term",
    estimate = "Coefficient",
    percent_change = "% Change in Income"
  ) %>%
  tab_source_note("Percent change is computed as exp(coefficient) - 1 for the log-income outcome.")
```

```{r}
pop_coef_1se %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Population Lasso Results at lambda.1se") %>%
  cols_label(
    term = "Term",
    estimate = "Coefficient",
    percent_change = "% Change in Income"
  ) %>%
  tab_source_note("lambda.1se is the more regularized model.")
```

```{r}
top5_increase_pop <- pop_coef_min %>%
  arrange(desc(estimate)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 5) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Top 5 Largest Income Increases: Population Lasso") %>%
  cols_label(
    term = "Term",
    estimate = "Coefficient",
    percent_change = "% Change in Income"
  ) %>%
  tab_source_note("% change relative to reference category, holding all else constant")

top5_decrease_pop <- pop_coef_min %>%
  arrange(estimate) %>%
  slice_head(n = 5) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Top 5 Largest Income Decreases: Population Lasso") %>%
  cols_label(
    term = "Term",
    estimate = "Coefficient",
    percent_change = "% Change in Income"
  ) %>%
  tab_source_note("% change relative to reference category, holding all else constant")

top5_increase_pop
top5_decrease_pop
```

LASSO FOR HISPANIC POPULATION ONLY

```{r}
model_inputs_hisp <- data %>% 
  dplyr::filter(
    age > 18,
    esr != "Not in Labor Force"
  ) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(
    cit_simp = ifelse(cit != "Not a U.S. citizen", "Citizen", "Non-Citizen"),
    cit_simp = factor(cit_simp, levels = c("Citizen", "Non-Citizen")),
    education = factor(
      education,
      levels = c(
        "Post-bacc professional degree",
        "Doctorate degree",
        "Master's degree",
        "Bachelor's degree",
        "Associate's degree",
        "Some college",
        "Regular high school diploma",
        "GED or alternative credential",
        "Less than High School"
      )
    )
  ) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(race_simp == "Hispanic") %>% 
  dplyr::select(
    income_personal, race_simp, cit_simp, education, pwgtp, age
  )
```

```{r}
model_inputs_hisp %>%
  summarise(
    education = names(sort(table(education), decreasing = TRUE))[1],
    cit_simp  = names(sort(table(cit_simp), decreasing = TRUE))[1]
  )

model_inputs_hisp %>% 
  filter(
    education == "Regular high school diploma",
    cit_simp == "Non-Citizen"
  ) %>% 
  nrow()
```

```{r}
lasso_data_hisp <- model_inputs_hisp %>% 
  mutate(
    log_income = log(income_personal),
    education = relevel(factor(education), ref = "Regular high school diploma"),
    cit_simp  = relevel(factor(cit_simp), ref = "Non-Citizen")
  ) %>% 
  filter(
    is.finite(log_income),
    !is.na(age),
    !is.na(education),
    !is.na(cit_simp),
    !is.na(pwgtp)
  )
```

```{r}
x_hisp <- model.matrix(
  log_income ~ age + education + cit_simp + education:cit_simp,
  data = lasso_data_hisp
)[, -1]

y_hisp <- lasso_data_hisp$log_income
w_hisp <- lasso_data_hisp$pwgtp
```

```{r}
set.seed(544)

cv_lasso_hisp <- cv.glmnet(
  x = x_hisp,
  y = y_hisp,
  alpha = 1,
  family = "gaussian",
  weights = w_hisp,
  standardize = TRUE,
  nfolds = 10
)

lasso_hisp_min <- glmnet(
  x = x_hisp,
  y = y_hisp,
  alpha = 1,
  family = "gaussian",
  weights = w_hisp,
  standardize = TRUE,
  lambda = cv_lasso_hisp$lambda.min
)

lasso_hisp_1se <- glmnet(
  x = x_hisp,
  y = y_hisp,
  alpha = 1,
  family = "gaussian",
  weights = w_hisp,
  standardize = TRUE,
  lambda = cv_lasso_hisp$lambda.1se
)
```

```{r}
plot(cv_lasso_hisp)
title("Hispanic-only Lasso CV Curve")
```

```{r}
hisp_coef_min <- coef(lasso_hisp_min) %>%
  as.matrix() %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("term") %>%
  rename(estimate = s0) %>%
  filter(term != "(Intercept)", estimate != 0) %>%
  mutate(
    percent_change = round((exp(estimate) - 1) * 100, 1)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(estimate)))

hisp_coef_1se <- coef(lasso_hisp_1se) %>%
  as.matrix() %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("term") %>%
  rename(estimate = s0) %>%
  filter(term != "(Intercept)", estimate != 0) %>%
  mutate(
    percent_change = round((exp(estimate) - 1) * 100, 1)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(estimate)))
```

```{r}
hisp_coef_min %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Hispanic-only Lasso Results at lambda.min") %>%
  cols_label(
    term = "Term",
    estimate = "Coefficient",
    percent_change = "% Change in Income"
  ) %>%
  tab_source_note("Percent change is computed as exp(coefficient) - 1 for the log-income outcome.")
```

```{r}
hisp_coef_1se %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Hispanic-only Lasso Results at lambda.1se") %>%
  cols_label(
    term = "Term",
    estimate = "Coefficient",
    percent_change = "% Change in Income"
  ) %>%
  tab_source_note("lambda.1se is the more regularized model.")
```

```{r}
top5_increase_hisp <- hisp_coef_min %>%
  arrange(desc(estimate)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 5) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Top 5 Largest Income Increases: Hispanic-only Lasso") %>%
  cols_label(
    term = "Term",
    estimate = "Coefficient",
    percent_change = "% Change in Income"
  ) %>%
  tab_source_note("% change relative to reference category, holding all else constant")

top5_decrease_hisp <- hisp_coef_min %>%
  arrange(estimate) %>%
  slice_head(n = 5) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Top 5 Largest Income Decreases: Hispanic-only Lasso") %>%
  cols_label(
    term = "Term",
    estimate = "Coefficient",
    percent_change = "% Change in Income"
  ) %>%
  tab_source_note("% change relative to reference category, holding all else constant")

top5_increase_hisp
top5_decrease_hisp
```
